description_long: This is a cylindrical jar with a black screw-on cap, featuring a predominantly white body and a blue label wrapped around its upper section. The label displays the brand name 'Calvé' in a bold, red font within a white, cloud-like shape, and the word 'Mayonaise' below it in blue. The label also includes nutritional information, a 'Beter Leven' certification with star ratings, and small food illustrations such as potatoes and eggs. The jar appears to be made of opaque plastic, with a smooth and glossy surface finish. The cap is solid black and likely made of plastic as well, providing a secure closure for the contents inside. This object is typically used to store and dispense lotion or similar viscous products.
description: A white cylindrical jar with a black screw-on cap and a blue label featuring the 'Calvé' brand and 'Mayonaise' product name, along with food illustrations and certification icons.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue label with nutritional information and part of the 'Beter Leven' certification, as well as the black cap.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'Calvé' brand logo, 'Mayonaise' product name, and food illustrations prominently on the blue label.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, highlighting the label's nutritional information and certification icons.
description_view_3: Another front view, nearly identical to view 1, with clear visibility of the brand and product name on the label.
